headerDisplay: Brings your TouchWand smart-home devices to Apple Home + Siri. Independent, third-party — not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by TouchWand.
footerDisplay: The Homebridge host must be on the same LAN as your TouchWand controller.

host.title: Controller IP address (on your LAN)
host.description: The local IP of your TouchWand controller.

hideUnconfigured.title: Hide unconfigured devices
hideUnconfigured.description: Skip devices that still carry their auto-generated controller name (e.g. "10.11 Switch") — endpoints nobody named are usually unused. Turn off to expose everything.

include.title: Always include (device names or ids)
include.description: Devices to expose even if they look unconfigured. Exact name (case-insensitive), device id, or a pattern with * wildcards.

exclude.title: Always exclude (device names or ids)
exclude.description: Devices to hide from Apple Home. Exact name (case-insensitive), device id, or a pattern with * wildcards (e.g. '*spare*').

allowNonPrivateHost.title: Allow a non-private controller host (advanced)
allowNonPrivateHost.description: Leave off. Only enable if your controller is reached via a non-LAN address you trust.
